ticket.subject: PluginHive & UPS® Digital Connections
ticket.description:
Thanks for being a part of UPS® Digital Connections & choosing PluginHive Shipping Solutions for your eCommerce store.

We have received the following details from you:
Name: Jennifer Wesley
Contact No.: US-1334-200-9649
Platform: Shopify
CTP Code: n/a
Pricing Plan: Starter
Message: I am reaching out on behalf of one of my customers interested in PluginHive. Please reach out to follow up on the rates/discounts applicable for being a customer of UPS. Thanks

Our support team will get back to you shortly. Please let us know if you have any queries.

Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive | www.pluginhive.com

Jennifer from UPS reached to us in relation to the UPS Digital connection program.
Adding Abhilash in the thread for taking it further.
I am sharing the appointment link and also about UPS digital connection link.
